title: chamaecrista diphylla
intro: Chamaecrista diphylla, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chamaecrista diphylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of diabetes and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, powder, or capsule, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
